title: Epstein Public-Record Research Target Queue
purpose: A controlled expansion queue for people, entities, institutions, banks, properties, aircraft/logistics nodes, media nodes, legal/prosecutorial nodes, and political/intelligence-adjacent overlap. This is not an accusation list. It is a research map that requires source class, boundary language, and record links before claims are made.
boundary: Inclusion means the person/entity has been publicly discussed, named, reported, litigated, connected through records, or is relevant to a public-record research lane. Inclusion does not mean guilt, criminal conduct, knowledge, or participation. Every item must be evidence-classified before publication.

categories.title: Political / Public Figures
categories.trackingQuestion: Which public officials, former officials, political advisors, donors, family networks, and political operators appear in court files, emails, flight/contact records, disclosure fights, or reputation-management narratives?
categories.boundary: Political proximity can show access, leverage, contradiction, or disclosure stakes. It is not automatic proof of criminal conduct.

categories.title: Finance / Banking / Money Trail
categories.trackingQuestion: Which banks, executives, funds, donors, payment channels, advisers, tax structures, and settlement/NDA channels helped normalize, move, hide, or explain Epstein money?
categories.boundary: Money flow and settlements are powerful research evidence but must be separated from admissions, denials, and court findings.

categories.title: Operations / Logistics / Staff
categories.trackingQuestion: Who handled scheduling, massage appointments, flight logistics, household operations, property access, staff communication, and document trails?
categories.boundary: Operational involvement has different evidence classes. Separate convicted conduct, testimony, employment role, denial, and alleged conduct.

categories.title: Media / Reputation / Narrative Management
categories.trackingQuestion: Which journalists, authors, publicists, publishers, lawyers, and strategists appear in image management, press strategy, book/interview strategy, or public denial/attack cycles?
targets: media outlets tied to document-release narratives
categories.boundary: Narrative management may expose leverage and image repair. It is not by itself evidence of Epstein crimes.

categories.title: Academic / Science / Philanthropy Access
categories.trackingQuestion: Which universities, scientists, philanthropists, foundations, donors, and policy-intellectual networks provided legitimacy, meetings, access, donations, or reputation laundering?
categories.boundary: Academic or philanthropy contact can show legitimacy laundering, not automatic criminality.

categories.title: Legal / Prosecution / State Power
categories.trackingQuestion: Which prosecutors, judges, attorneys, agencies, jail officials, oversight bodies, and disclosure authorities shaped the plea deal, custody, redactions, subpoenas, releases, and secrecy?
categories.boundary: Institutional failure, prosecutorial discretion, and secrecy are not the same thing. The site must classify what the record supports.

categories.title: Aviation / Property / Corridor Nodes
categories.trackingQuestion: Which aircraft, tail numbers, pilots, passenger records, properties, routes, islands, ranches, apartments, and arrival/departure patterns line up with people and dates?
categories.boundary: A flight or property visit is a logistics record. It proves a recorded movement or proximity, not motive or guilt.

publicationRules: Every target must display evidenceClass before appearing as a public card.
Every target must include a boundary line separating record, allegation, denial, settlement, and court finding.
Every target must link to at least one source door before being promoted from queue to public card.
Use the term institutional overlap rather than unsupported deep-state conclusion unless a primary record supports a specific institutional role.
Do not publish victim-identifying private details beyond already-public court/reporting context.
